name: ADR validator confirms a context section is present with a non-trivial body per MADR
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1
status: accepted
deciders: [alice]
## Context
A real architectural context describing the situation we face.
' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check context 2>out.txt && grep -q 'context_present=true' out.txt && grep -q 'context_length>=20' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
